OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert; Clerk: sravinantapricha ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, is present. Represented by Gwen Washington
Attorney, Monelle Palencia, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Brandy Smith, is present.
Attorney, Richard McNeil, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.
